headline: Crypto's Stablecoin Surge Revives November 2021 Anxiety
narrative: Stablecoin growth and ETF inflows, reminiscent of November 2021, fuel market anxiety as Bitcoin hovers around $76k, despite a bullish 30-day momentum.
